texto: At lastdon't be anything for mebe something which isClear as ocean waterBe cloud , but don't rain on meBe sun, but don't shine for meBe moon, but don't enlighten meBut be lucid, in whatYou are to meSo that I can think, where do you exist
explicacao: Citação de Arshad Ahmad sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “At lastdon't be anything for mebe something which isClear as ocean waterBe cloud , but don't rain…” articula reflexao, love-quotes, lastdon em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
